## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=moderate`
- [ ] `npm run validate:migrations`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`
- [ ] `npm run check:covers`
